name: ProxMigrate
description: Self-hosted web UI for Proxmox VE — import disk images, create and manage VMs and LXC containers, deploy community scripts, and more.

notes.text: Default credentials are admin / Password! — you are forced to change the password on first login.
Access the web UI at https://<container-ip>:8443 (self-signed certificate — accept the browser warning).
After login, the setup wizard guides you through connecting to your Proxmox host via API token and SSH key.
